title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 292.160 - Separate water closets
text:
292.160.  Separate water closets. — Separate water closets shall be provided for the use of employees of either sex in manufacturing, mechanical, mercantile and other establishments in this state where persons of both sexes are employed.
(RSMo 1939 § 10191) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 13231; 1919 § 6795; 1909 § 7836
